evals.prompt: I want to deploy Vaultwarden to my homelab. It's a self-hosted Bitwarden-compatible password manager. The Helm chart is available as an OCI chart: registry `oci://ghcr.io/gabe565/charts`, chart name `vaultwarden`. I don't need any secrets configured yet — just get the basic deployment scaffolded.
evals.expected_output: All 5 required files created (namespace.yaml, helmrelease.yaml, values.yaml, app kustomization.yaml, and updates to apps/kustomization.yaml and infrastructure/controllers/kustomization.yaml with the new HelmRepository), using correct apiVersion and OCI HelmRepository type.
